title: Sesame Bun Burger Bites
description: A kid-friendly and raw-friendly salty, silky Egyptian dish featuring sesame seed burger buns that are crispy on the outside and soft inside, perfect for a quick snack or breakfast.
instructions: Mix minced garlic and olive oil in a bowl. Brush this mixture on the inside of the bread rolls.
Spread sesame seeds evenly over each roll, ensuring they're completely covered.
Press down lightly on each roll with your fingers so that the sesame seeds adhere better to the surface.
Dip the coated rolls into panko breadcrumbs, allowing them to stick to the sesame seeds. You can also dip them in water or egg wash for extra stickiness if desired.
Arrange the sesame seed-covered bread rolls in a baking tray with some space between each roll to allow for even cooking.
Bake the sesame bun burger bites for about 10-15 minutes, or until they're golden brown and crispy on the outside. Check from time to time to ensure they don't burn.
Once done, remove them from the oven and serve immediately while still warm.
Optional: Drizzle with a bit of extra sesame oil for an added flavor.
